case_title: INTEGRATED CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC. VS ASIA JANITORIAL (MAI THI BUI)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,135.00 FILED BY INTEGRATED CLEANING SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ASIA JANITORIAL (MAI THI BUI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ASIA JANITORIAL (MAI THI BUI) DEFT IS ORDERED TO COOPERATE FULLY WITH PLAINTIFF WITH RESPECT TO THE CLAIM AGAINST THEM BY IMPRESSIONS SALON.
